languages.text: "Раз вы собираетесь присягнуть мне, то вот мой первый приказ: убейте тварь и верните меня на мой флагман!"
"Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"
languages.original_text: "Раз вы собираетесь присягнуть мне, то вот мой первый приказ: убейте тварь и верните меня на мой флагман!"

traits.locale_text: "As you seek to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"
"As you seek to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"
"Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"
"Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"
"Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"

languages.text: "Nachdem Ihr Euren Eid leisten wollt, ist hier meiner erster Befehl: Vernichtet diese Kreatur und bringt mich zurück auf mein Flaggschiff!"
languages.original_text: "Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"

traits.locale_text: "Nachdem Ihr Euren Eid leisten wollt, ist hier meiner erster Befehl: Vernichtet diese Kreatur und bringt mich zurück auf mein Flaggschiff!"

languages.text: « Puisque vous souhaitez honorer votre serment, voici votre première mission : détruisez cette créature et ramenez-moi à mon vaisseau amiral ! »
languages.original_text: "Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"

traits.locale_text: « Puisque vous souhaitez honorer votre serment, voici votre première mission : détruisez cette créature et ramenez-moi à mon vaisseau amiral ! »

languages.text: «Si quieren prestar juramento, esta es mi primera orden: ¡destruyan a esa criatura y llévenme a mi nave insignia!».
languages.original_text: "Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"

traits.locale_text: «Si quieren prestar juramento, esta es mi primera orden: ¡destruyan a esa criatura y llévenme a mi nave insignia!».

languages.text: "Madem yemin etmek istiyorsunuz, ilk emrimi veriyorum: O yaratığı yok edin ve beni sancak gemime geri götürün!"
languages.original_text: "Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"

traits.locale_text: "Madem yemin etmek istiyorsunuz, ilk emrimi veriyorum: O yaratığı yok edin ve beni sancak gemime geri götürün!"

languages.text: “既然你们想宣誓效忠，那我的第一条命令就是：干掉那头怪物，把我送回旗舰！”
languages.original_text: "Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"

traits.locale_text: “既然你们想宣誓效忠，那我的第一条命令就是：干掉那头怪物，把我送回旗舰！”

languages.text: 「君たちは誓いを立てたいのか。ならば、私の最初の命令は、その生き物を破壊し、私を旗艦に連れ戻すことだ！」
languages.original_text: "Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"

traits.locale_text: 「君たちは誓いを立てたいのか。ならば、私の最初の命令は、その生き物を破壊し、私を旗艦に連れ戻すことだ！」
